title: spiraea × oblongifolia
intro: Spiraea × oblongifolia is a hybrid plant species, commonly known as the double-flowered spiraea, which belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Spiraea × oblongifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Spiraea × oblongifolia is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
